sourceMovie.title: Mad Max 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Mad Max 2 works as a adventure movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The adventure and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Matrix Revolutions
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Mad Max 2 clicked for you, The Matrix Revolutions (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Mad Max 2?
faq.answer: Try The Matrix Revolutions, Mad Max, Extinction—each shares DNA with Mad Max 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Mad Max 2?
faq.answer: Mad Max 2 (1981) is best described as Adventure, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Mad Max 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Mad Max Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
